description: Footdigest: the all-time head-to-head record between two men's national teams from the historical results dataset, wins, draws, goals, recent meetings, and penalty shootouts. Ask by team names.

labels.name: get_qualification_scenarios
labels.description: Footdigest: a team's chance of qualifying from its group, and how each remaining group result would move it ("if X beats Y, Z's chances become..."). Seeded and reproducible. Give the competition slug and a team name.

labels.name: get_standings
labels.description: Footdigest: current group standings for a competition, points, goal difference, position, and qualification status per team. Give the competition slug (e.g. "world-cup-2026"), optionally a single group code.

labels.name: get_schedule
labels.description: Footdigest: a competition's fixtures with teams, kickoff time, status, score, and stage. Give the competition slug; optionally filter by `status` (e.g. scheduled, live, finished) and cap with `limit`.

labels.name: get_match
labels.description: Footdigest: one fixture in detail, teams, status, kickoff, score, stage, venue, and the event timeline (goals, cards, subs). Ask by `match_id` (from get_schedule).

labels.name: get_team_availability
labels.description: Footdigest: a team's active injuries in a competition, player, type, status, and expected return. Give the competition slug and a team name.

labels.name: get_match_brief
labels.description: Footdigest: the AI-generated brief for a match, the pre-match five-lens brief, the post-match recap, and event impacts, sourced from Footdigest's engine. Ask by `match_id`; optional `locale` (en or fr).

labels.name: get_defining_moments
labels.description: Footdigest: a competition's defining moments, the results that moved teams across the qualification line, most consequential first, with the group table crossings. Give the competition slug; optional `limit`.

labels.name: get_suspension_watch
labels.description: Footdigest: who is suspended for their next match and who is one booking away from a ban in a competition, per the competition's fair-play rules. Give the competition slug.

labels.name: get_bracket
labels.description: Footdigest: a competition's knockout bracket, matches grouped by round (round of 32 through the final) with teams, scores, shootouts, status, and winners. Give the competition slug.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_match_brief · Private data: get_head_to_head · Public sink: get_match_brief · Destructive: simulate, get_tournament_odds.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_match_brief · Private data: get_head_to_head · Public sink: get_match_brief · Destructive: simulate, get_tournament_odds

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
